title: Dзscriptivз 3ntity Tags
description: Provides entity tags that are usefully descriptive.
body:
This mod provides over thirty entity tags intended to describe each entity in vanilla, as well as many popular mods.

This mod is a required dependency for my other mod called MISC3LLAN3OUS.

It also adds many mobs to Tetra's #slimeblood and #lavablood.

It adds a few mobs to #forge:bosses and #c/forge:golems, which were not added to it by their native mod.

It also groups backport mobs together with their vanilla counterparts into individual tags. So if your mod is checking for a newer vanilla mob, you can use these tags for compatibility with backport mods.

I highly encourage people who make mods for Forge 1.20.1 to use this as a dependency, to add their own mobs to these tags externally and to use these tags for many possible purposes, such as enchantments, potion effects and other behaviors.
Random example: "Mouse Omen" potion effect - makes #d3t:feline mobs attack the affected entity.
Because using tags is easier and more compatibility-friendly than checking for specific mobs :)

I plan to cover mobs from many mods, but you can also add your mobs to the same tags without my involvement.

You are free to use this mod as you wish, including extracting the data folder to turn it into a datapack instead of a mod.

Currently covered mods include:
Alex's Mobs,
Autumnity,
Aviar,
Blue Skies,
L_Ender 's Cataclysm,
The Endergetic Expansion,
Caverns and Chasms,
Chulls,
Environmental,
Everything is Copper,
Friends and Foes,
Hemalurgy,
Herios' Floral Expansion,
Herios' Helian Mod,
LUMINOUS: BEASTS,
LUMINOUS: HALLOWEEN,
LUMINOUS: NETHER,
LUMINOUS: OVERWORLD,
Mowzie's Mobs,
Multiverse,
Nether Depths Upgrade,
The Outer End,
Quark,
Savage and Ravage,
Simply Steel Continued,
Spawn,
Supplementaries,
Surgebinder,
It Takes A Pillage,
The Bumblezone,
The Twilight Forest,
The Undergarden,
Unusual Prehistory 2,
Upgrade Aquatic,
Vermin

Currently added tags are
#d3t:...
insects,
crustaceans,
arachnids,
sapient,
flying,
organic,
constructs,
mechanical,
spirits,
spectral,
plants,
disease,
grazers,
squishy,
void,
serpentine,
birds,
mammals,
reptiles,
hollow,
fungal,
hybrids,
sorcerous,
rigid,
alien,
amphibious,
hot,
frigid,
warm,
cold,
greedy,
amphibious,
porcine,
bovine,
ovine,
caprine,
bovidae,
fluffy,
molluscs,
feline,
canine,
fishes,
rocklife

More tags may be added later, but I want to focus more on covering more mods. Still, if you have a suggestion for another tag, leave it in the comments. You may also comment mod suggestions.





Here is my Discord server: [https://discord.gg/AScKNEcjDX](https://discord.gg/AScKNEcjDX)
